content.rendered:
Unseen and expensive, roofing problems are a pain to get sorted. A little problem can develop into a huge issue, while a hidden problem can be a nightmare to solve. It is better to know what the potential roofing problems could be and what to do to do about them.

Six Of The Most Common Roofing Problems In Calgary

  1. Roofing Leaks – Perhaps the most and well-known roofing problem that people know about. Leaks can happen any time of the year, and once it starts, it’s a process to fix it. It is imperative that you get a Calgary roofing contractor to help you as soon as possible. They will be able to find the source of the leak and close it down for you. Leaving it run loose will cause you more issues in the long run. 
  2. Cracked, Missing Or Broken Shingles – Shingles – also known as roofing tiles – are like the skin of your roof. If they start to break, crack or go missing, you are opening yourself to a world of problems. Calling in a professional to replace and repair your shingles will give your roof a longer lifespan (and save you dealing with issues in the future).
  3. Structural Damage – In the event of a storm, trees, debris and intense winds can damage the structure of your roof. That means that any roof collapse can happen at any time. Holes, punctures and leftover debris are the signs to notice. If you suspect the structure of your roof is compromised, call a Calgary roofing company immediately. 
  4. Poor Flashing Installation – The flashing is an important part of your roof’s security. Therefore, you have to make sure that it’s in good condition. However, in some cases, the flashing is poorly installed. When it is not installed correctly, it allows rain, moisture and stuff to seep in. Getting your flashing repaired is essential for the protection of your home.
  5. Poor Maintenance – If you don’t look after your roof, you could be inviting problems without realising it. Leaving debris on the roof, letting water pool in, and not cleaning it, invites unwanted pressure on your roof, which is only going to cause more problems in the future. One way to stop this is to get a roofing company in Calgary to inspect to see if you have any underlying problems.
  6. Clogged Or Damaged Gutters – Often cast aside compared to the rest of the roof, gutters are an important section of maintaining the strength of the roof. Roof rundown is vital to help prevent flooding, roof pooling and moisture damage. That’s why it’s important for gutters to function correctly, and getting gutter repairs is the way to do it.

At City Roofing and Exteriors we take pride in our work and by serving Calgarians. We work hard to assist our customers in providing proper roofing systems to meet your budget and needs. We guarantee that you will be satisfied with our work, give us a call at (403) 608-9933 or email us at info@calgarycityroofing.com.
